_comment: Recipe: does openfugu's TRINITY structural idea (one-shot predictive routing -- a cheap classifier picks ONE worker, dispatch once, no retry) beat gama's own MeshflowBackend (sequential verification escalation) on the SAME two local Mac Studio models? See recipe.md for the honesty caveat: this is a structural proxy (prompted classification), not openfugu's hidden-state/CMA-ES-trained router. Replace ssh_host with your Mac's SSH host (user@host). Reproduce with: gama bench --suite hard --backends trinity,meshflow,ssh-openai --config recipes/mac-studio-trinity/config.json
